changes: Telegram bot rewritten to the reference mixin architecture (1:1 menu/dashboard)
Admin menu: Licenses CRUD, Monitor (status/connections/accounts/logs), Signals tracking, System Info
User dashboard: Account (with connection), Trading (open/closed), Signals, Kill Switch, Settings
Ported constants/helpers/keyboards + 8 mixins (auth, menu, licenses, monitoring, signals, settings, user_dashboard, conversations)
Removed dashboards.py; rewrote telegram tests (pure helpers + 64-case router dispatch)
notes: Admin-only bot: no end-user registration, Subscribe (NOWPayments), or Support (AI chat). Bot-wide settings persist to bot_settings.json.
